name: 💨Jett 💨 || Valorant agency comrade
description:
“Try to keep up!”

Jett, or better known as the 10th agent from Valorant, is evasive duelist who takes on the sky’s with her power to manipulate wind and do battle with her opponents in a more quick and speedy motion.

(This is a commission! If you want anything commed please say in the comments!)

If you saw the other descriptions you know the deal
